transcript.text:
I will be a picky eater [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Dak Galbi on Tuesday...] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Jjok Galbi on Thursday...] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[And LA Galbi today!]
It's a been a while since I did a homey meal like this
[2 good foods go well together]
[Well then...]
[Mix it all up]
[Insane...]
A death sentence if this isn't tasty
Hello everyone
Today, I have LA galbi (grilled ribs), spicy stir-fried webfoot octopus,
And some ice cream as dessert
These meal kits are from "Wing It"
I just downloaded this from curiosity
And they have lots of meal kits on their app

They're also hosting an event for this collaboration
You can get a 10,000 Won certificate if you go to this link
For new customers, the webfoot octopus is only 1,000 Won (~$0.78 USD), LA galbi for 8,900 Won (~$6.95 USD),
There are coupons like that available for you guys
I'll put these back in the freezer so they don't melt
I need to cook these now
LA Galbi This is huge
1.5kg?!
That's a lot of food, since I eat about 3kgs
Getting galbi delivered to your home is fine too, but
they tend to get cold, so it's not as good
So it's much better to cook them at home
Packaged like this
I'll bring the tools
[1.5kg of LA galbi...]
Let's play tetris!

It's so convenient to have this dish from home now thanks to meal kits
I was able to eat these like once a year
Let's cook the webfoot octopus here
Cook the onions and scallions with oil first
[Big chunks]
This is a good amount too 500 grams
The actress Chun Woo Hee is the model for this brand
She stated in the commercial that she will be a picky eater with "Wing It"
I will declare that too
Well, I'm already a picky eater
I think I poured too much broth
This became a braised LA galbi
[Let's save this dish!]
And let the rest soak in the meat
Looks delicious
Sizzle sizzle sizzle sizzle

[Move them to the plate]
That was a lot faster than expected
I will need to prepare at least 1kg of these
Wow, the visuals
It's crazy
It's perfect
Very good
Let's plate it
I'm exhausted
It's a been a while since I did a homey meal like this
Bon appetit
And have a table full of food
Let's try the LA galbi while it's still warm
Homemade LA galbi
This really tastes homemade
Sweet Cooked from home

I used to love these when I was young
That's delicious
It's something everyone would enjoy
And the meat is very tender
The sauce really suits my taste
[Might look ugly when deboning the galbi]
Not too bland, not too salty It's perfectly seasoned
1 pack is 1.5kgs
Perfect for 3-4 people
Honestly, it would've tasted better if it was hot
These got cold because I was cooking the other dishes
I was worried that the meat would be tough
But the tenderness of the meat and the sauce is perfect
Webfoot octopus now
The octopus has a great consistency
So good

It just looks good too, right?
It's not salty, but it's a little spicy
Not too spicy though Just about right
Ta-da
Thin noodles
You can't forget these
This has enough sauce
Perfect for fried rice or extra noodles
This is being recorded, right?
[40 minutes of footage not recorded from this mukbang]
The sauce is everything for these noodles
Just 1,000 Won if you're a new customer?! (~$0.78)
I gotta register
It's good
I don't need any other side dishes
It has a little bit of fat

It just the right amount of fat
A perfect ratio with the meat
I don't need anything else
The main dish is too good
With kimchi
Japchae (glass noodles)
You thought I wouldn't eat lotus roots, right?
Delicious
Spam
It's gotten cold
Spam over rice
And webfoot octopus
I'll focus on eating now
Using the hands
Separate it like this
Do they sell boneless LA galbi?

That'll be so convenient
Just like this
Webfoot Octopus Ribs
The fried eggs look so fake
Meal kits used to be not as good as actual foods
But these are better than delivery food
The world is becoming a better place
When I was younger...
[Cut]
It's so tender even if it's been sitting here for a while
It's a great brand
I'll stock up on these
I have a plan
Leave a little bit of this
Mix them all up together
I don't like this kimchi

[It's over-fermented... too sour]
I'll make fried rice with these next time
[Wait... is it time for...]
Should I make the bibimbap? (mixed rice)
Bibimbap rice
[Spicy stir-fried webfoot octopus...]
[And all the veggies]
[The visuals...]
[Producer Tzu]
[It's hard to mix with 1 hand]
Let's stop
Put everything
[How about this time...]
[I mean... well...]
I can't do this
This is better

A death sentence if this isn't good
Crazy
Let's summon our drink
Please... edit that out
[Sure]
This is where you belong
I knew there was a use for you
Can't forget fried eggs on bibimbap
Cut it
[Who thought of this combination?!]
Me
This isn't salty
Do you know what time it is?
It's 5am
[There's a person that eats like this at 5 in the morning...?]
Me

I'm having a great meal right now
But I'm looking forward to the ice cream I'll be eating soon
Everyone craves ice cream after a homey meal
[Let's finish it up]
[LA galbi being devoured...]
It keeps going in
Refill the bibimbap
Rest of the rice
[Mix mix]
Japchae in here too?
What is this?
"Good food mixed with good food is still good food." -Home-Cooked Meal Teacher Ms.Tzu
I'm so excited thinking about the ice cream
Let's finish this
[Cleared]
Ice cream Must have some ice cream

Let's clean up
[Quickly]
Corn mochi and roasted soybean mochi
6 of them in here
Made with 100% domestic glutinous rice So it's very chewy
Corn first
Looks so cute
Do you guys know the corn-shaped ice cream?
But this has a lot more kernels
It has chocolate too?
Full of corn And it has chocolate too
Roasted soybean powder outside
[Filled with sweet redbean paste]
It already knows too
This reminds me of the fish-shaped ice cream
With soybean powder

Eating dessert after a meal is the best
I will end it after this one
I'll save the rest for later
[Finished]
I had the meal kits from Wing It today
They were very delicious even if they were meal kits, And they were very cost-efficient
They're hosting a 10,000 Won coupon event for my subscribers, and discounted prices for new customers
So check out the description box for more information
Thanks everyone
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Taereung Regional Children's Welfare Center'] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
